subject: [GLOBAL] Align gitlab CI & tox pylint profile
commit_message:
[GLOBAL] Align gitlab CI & tox pylint profile

These profiles use 2 different syntax with find.
The one used by tox is more portable among other things.

Issue-ID: OOM-2643
Signed-off-by: guillaume.lambert <guillaume.lambert@orange.com>
Change-Id: I45379a7012f5bfc39f0629b378e889c50f3f3248
